# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: microservices-stack
description: A Helm chart for deploying a microservices stack
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"
---
# values.yaml
global:
  imagePullSecrets: []
  nameOverride: ""
  fullnameOverride: ""
  labels: {}
  annotations: {}

services:
  - name: gateway
    enabled: true
    image:
      repository: nginx
      tag: "1.27"
      pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
    replicas: 1
    service:
      type: ClusterIP
      port: 80
    containerPort: 80
    env: []
    envFrom: []
    resources: {}
    nodeSelector: {}
    tolerations: []
    affinity: {}
    config:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /etc/config
      data: {}
    secret:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /etc/secret
      data: {}
    persistence:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /data
      size: 1Gi
      storageClassName: ""
      accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
    probes:
      liveness:
        enabled: false
        path: /
        port: http
        initialDelaySeconds: 10
        periodSeconds: 10
      readiness:
        enabled: false
        path: /
        port: http
        initialDelaySeconds: 5
        periodSeconds: 10
    ingress:
      enabled: false
      className: ""
      annotations: {}
      hosts:
        - host: example.local
          paths:
            - path: /
              pathType: Prefix
      tls: []

  - name: users
    enabled: true
    image:
      repository: hashicorp/http-echo
      tag: "1.0.0"
      pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
    replicas: 1
    service:
      type: ClusterIP
      port: 8080
    containerPort: 5678
    args: ["-text=users"]
    env: []
    envFrom: []
    resources: {}
    nodeSelector: {}
    tolerations: []
    affinity: {}
    config:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /etc/config
      data: {}
    secret:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /etc/secret
      data: {}
    persistence:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /data
      size: 1Gi
      storageClassName: ""
      accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
    probes:
      liveness:
        enabled: false
        path: /
        port: http
        initialDelaySeconds: 10
        periodSeconds: 10
      readiness:
        enabled: false
        path: /
        port: http
        initialDelaySeconds: 5
        periodSeconds: 10
    ingress:
      enabled: false
      className: ""
      annotations: {}
      hosts:
        - host: users.example.local
          paths:
            - path: /
              pathType: Prefix
      tls: []

  - name: orders
    enabled: true
    image:
      repository: hashicorp/http-echo
      tag: "1.0.0"
      pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
    replicas: 1
    service:
      type: ClusterIP
      port: 8080
    containerPort: 5678
    args: ["-text=orders"]
    env: []
    envFrom: []
    resources: {}
    nodeSelector: {}
    tolerations: []
    affinity: {}
    config:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /etc/config
      data: {}
    secret:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /etc/secret
      data: {}
    persistence:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /data
      size: 1Gi
      storageClassName: ""
      accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
    probes:
      liveness:
        enabled: false
        path: /
        port: http
        initialDelaySeconds: 10
        periodSeconds: 10
      readiness:
        enabled: false
        path: /
        port: http
        initialDelaySeconds: 5
        periodSeconds: 10
    ingress:
      enabled: false
      className: ""
      annotations: {}
      hosts:
        - host: orders.example.local
          paths:
            - path: /
              pathType: Prefix
      tls: []

  - name: payments
    enabled: true
    image:
      repository: hashicorp/http-echo
      tag: "1.0.0"
      pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
    replicas: 1
    service:
      type: ClusterIP
      port: 8080
    containerPort: 5678
    args: ["-text=payments"]
    env: []
    envFrom: []
    resources: {}
    nodeSelector: {}
    tolerations: []
    affinity: {}
    config:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /etc/config
      data: {}
    secret:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /etc/secret
      data: {}
    persistence:
      enabled: false
      mountPath: /data
      size: 1Gi
      storageClassName: ""
      accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
    probes:
      liveness:
        enabled: false
        path: /
        port: http
        initialDelaySeconds: 10
        periodSeconds: 10
      readiness:
        enabled: false
        path: /
        port: http
        initialDelaySeconds: 5
        periodSeconds: 10
    ingress:
      enabled: false
      className: ""
      annotations: {}
      hosts:
        - host: payments.example.local
          paths:
            - path: /
              pathType: Prefix
      tls: []

---
# templates/_helpers.tpl
{{- define "microservices-stack.name" -}}
{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.global.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "microservices-stack.fullname" -}}
{{- if .Values.global.fullnameOverride -}}
{{- .Values.global.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- else -}}
{{- printf "%s" (include "microservices-stack.name" .) | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "microservices-stack.svcname" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" (include "microservices-stack.fullname" .root) .service.name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "microservices-stack.labels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "microservices-stack.name" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
helm.sh/chart: {{ printf "%s-%s" .Chart.Name .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" }}
{{- range $k, $v := .Values.global.labels }}
{{ $k }}: {{ $v | quote }}
{{- end }}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "microservices-stack.name" . }}
{{- end -}}

---
# templates/serviceaccount.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    {{- toYaml .Values.global.annotations | nindent 4 }}
imagePullSecrets:
  {{- toYaml .Values.global.imagePullSecrets | nindent 2 }}

---
# templates/deployments.yaml
{{- range $svc := .Values.services }}
{{- if $svc.enabled }}
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.svcname" (dict "root" $ "service" $svc) }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: {{ $svc.name }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ default 1 $svc.replicas }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" $ | nindent 6 }}
      app.kubernetes.io/component: {{ $svc.name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" $ | nindent 8 }}
        app.kubernetes.io/component: {{ $svc.name }}
      annotations:
        {{- toYaml $.Values.global.annotations | nindent 8 }}
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: {{ include "microservices-stack.fullname" $ }}
      {{- if $.Values.global.imagePullSecrets }}
      imagePullSecrets:
        {{- toYaml $.Values.global.imagePullSecrets | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      containers:
        - name: {{ $svc.name }}
          image: "{{ $svc.image.repository }}:{{ $svc.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ default "IfNotPresent" $svc.image.pullPolicy }}
          {{- if $svc.command }}
          command:
            {{- toYaml $svc.command | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- if $svc.args }}
          args:
            {{- toYaml $svc.args | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ default $svc.service.port $svc.containerPort }}
              protocol: TCP
          {{- if or $svc.env $svc.envFrom }}
          env:
            {{- toYaml $svc.env | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- if $svc.envFrom }}
          envFrom:
            {{- toYaml $svc.envFrom | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- if $svc.resources }}
          resources:
            {{- toYaml $svc.resources | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
          volumeMounts:
            {{- if and $svc.config $svc.config.enabled }}
            - name: config
              mountPath: {{ $svc.config.mountPath }}
            {{- end }}
            {{- if and $svc.secret $svc.secret.enabled }}
            - name: secret
              mountPath: {{ $svc.secret.mountPath }}
              readOnly: true
            {{- end }}
            {{- if and $svc.persistence $svc.persistence.enabled }}
            - name: data
              mountPath: {{ $svc.persistence.mountPath }}
            {{- end }}
          {{- if and $svc.probes $svc.probes.liveness $svc.probes.liveness.enabled }}
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ $svc.probes.liveness.path }}
              port: {{ $svc.probes.liveness.port }}
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ $svc.probes.liveness.initialDelaySeconds }}
            periodSeconds: {{ $svc.probes.liveness.periodSeconds }}
          {{- end }}
          {{- if and $svc.probes $svc.probes.readiness $svc.probes.readiness.enabled }}
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: {{ $svc.probes.readiness.path }}
              port: {{ $svc.probes.readiness.port }}
            initialDelaySeconds: {{ $svc.probes.readiness.initialDelaySeconds }}
            periodSeconds: {{ $svc.probes.readiness.periodSeconds }}
          {{- end }}
      volumes:
        {{- if and $svc.config $svc.config.enabled }}
        - name: config
          configMap:
            name: {{ include "microservices-stack.svcname" (dict "root" $ "service" $svc) }}-config
        {{- end }}
        {{- if and $svc.secret $svc.secret.enabled }}
        - name: secret
          secret:
            secretName: {{ include "microservices-stack.svcname" (dict "root" $ "service" $svc) }}-secret
        {{- end }}
        {{- if and $svc.persistence $svc.persistence.enabled }}
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: {{ include "microservices-stack.svcname" (dict "root" $ "service" $svc) }}-pvc
        {{- end }}
      {{- if $svc.nodeSelector }}
      nodeSelector:
        {{- toYaml $svc.nodeSelector | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- if $svc.tolerations }}
      tolerations:
        {{- toYaml $svc.tolerations | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- if $svc.affinity }}
      affinity:
        {{- toYaml $svc.affinity | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
---
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/services.yaml
{{- range $svc := .Values.services }}
{{- if $svc.enabled }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.svcname" (dict "root" $ "service" $svc) }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: {{ $svc.name }}
spec:
  type: {{ default "ClusterIP" $svc.service.type }}
  selector:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.selectorLabels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: {{ $svc.name }}
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: {{ $svc.service.port }}
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
---
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/configmaps.yaml
{{- range $svc := .Values.services }}
{{- if and $svc.enabled $svc.config $svc.config.enabled }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.svcname" (dict "root" $ "service" $svc) }}-config
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: {{ $svc.name }}
data:
  {{- toYaml $svc.config.data | nindent 2 }}
---
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/secrets.yaml
{{- range $svc := .Values.services }}
{{- if and $svc.enabled $svc.secret $svc.secret.enabled }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.svcname" (dict "root" $ "service" $svc) }}-secret
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: {{ $svc.name }}
type: Opaque
stringData:
  {{- toYaml $svc.secret.data | nindent 2 }}
---
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/pvcs.yaml
{{- range $svc := .Values.services }}
{{- if and $svc.enabled $svc.persistence $svc.persistence.enabled }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.svcname" (dict "root" $ "service" $svc) }}-pvc
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: {{ $svc.name }}
spec:
  accessModes:
    {{- toYaml $svc.persistence.accessModes | nindent 4 }}
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: {{ $svc.persistence.size }}
  {{- if $svc.persistence.storageClassName }}
  storageClassName: {{ $svc.persistence.storageClassName }}
  {{- end }}
---
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/ingresses.yaml
{{- range $svc := .Values.services }}
{{- if and $svc.enabled $svc.ingress $svc.ingress.enabled }}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ include "microservices-stack.svcname" (dict "root" $ "service" $svc) }}
  labels:
    {{- include "microservices-stack.labels" $ | nindent 4 }}
    app.kubernetes.io/component: {{ $svc.name }}
  {{- if $svc.ingress.annotations }}
  annotations:
    {{- toYaml $svc.ingress.annotations | nindent 4 }}
  {{- end }}
spec:
  {{- if $svc.ingress.className }}
  ingressClassName: {{ $svc.ingress.className }}
  {{- end }}
  rules:
    {{- range $host := $svc.ingress.hosts }}
    - host: {{ $host.host }}
      http:
        paths:
          {{- range $p := $host.paths }}
          - path: {{ $p.path }}
            pathType: {{ $p.pathType }}
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{ include "microservices-stack.svcname" (dict "root" $ "service" $svc) }}
                port:
                  number: {{ $svc.service.port }}
          {{- end }}
    {{- end }}
  {{- if $svc.ingress.tls }}
  tls:
    {{- toYaml $svc.ingress.tls | nindent 4 }}
  {{- end }}
---
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/NOTES.txt
Deploy complete.
Services are created per values.yaml under .services.
To expose a service, enable .services[].ingress.enabled and set hosts, or change service type.
